title: CRUCIX Market Shock Radar
subtitle: World events → market transmission channels

shockScore.interpretation: Multiple high-scoring signals suggest broad market-risk transmission channels. Score is moderated because many signals are concentrated in one category.

items.text: It is also reported that there has been a fire in the vicinity of the oil refinery in Tula, Russia, but that it was not caused by a drone or missile strike.
